videosLimit.description: Max number of videos to fetch (1-200)

onlyPostsNewerThan.description: Only return videos published on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

onlyPostsOlderThan.description: Only return videos published on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

sortBy.description: Sort order for the videos returned

cacheMedia.description: Download cover thumbnails (and slideshow images) so historical runs render after TikTok URLs expire. Adds ~1-3s per video.

cacheVideos.description: Also download the full MP4 video files. Storage-heavy — only enable if you need the videos offline.
